response: "when x equals 2, the value is zero so 16 minus 12 plus 2a plus b equals zero, meaning b equals negative 2a minus 4. to have x equal 2 as a double root, the derivative at x equals 2 must be zero, which gives 24 minus 12 plus a equals zero, so a equals negative 12. substituting a equals negative 12 into the first equation yields b equals 20."
